FAQ Email

● [Question #3]

Urgency Email
From: Father Time/Mother Nature
Subject: You ain’t getting younger.. Do this now.
Body:
Hey,
Father Time/Mother Nature here.
I’ve got some bad news..
You ain’t getting younger/slimmer/healthier/etc.
You’ve still got so much to enjoy from life!
● [Desired lifestyle perk your product delivers.]
● [Desired lifestyle perk your product delivers.]
● [Desired lifestyle perk your product delivers.]
But the sad truth is this requires time/money/looks/etc.
Know why most people don’t have that?
Because [xyz reason].
[Twist the knife].
So I’d HIGHLY RECOMMEND you do something to give you more time/money/health/looks/etc
each day.
Like [starting a business/learning from an expert/using our product].
[CTA to return to cart, get on a call, etc.]

Last Chance
From: [Your Name]/[Brand Name]
Subject:
● Example #1: Last Day Before [Product] Goes Up $$$
● Example #2: Last Day To Become/Achieve [Outcome]
Body:
[Open with a question.]
[Acknowledge the reader's frustration with others achieving a desired result, but not them.]
[Use a little bit of on-brand humor.]
[Explain that you have the Unique Mechanism to finally achieve that result.]
[Product photo or shopping cart]
[This product/achievement came from trial & error/risk/money invested by you.]
[You would have achieved the desired result in (time) had someone given the product/solution to
you. But now the reader can!]
[They must act fast though. The price goes up tomorrow/in an hour/etc.]
[Reply to this email/Click the link] to [book a call]/[return to your cart]/[etc].
